title: Sindhu, Shetty Advance in China Open, Shetty Upsets World No. 11
indian_angle: Top Indian players PV Sindhu and Ayush Shetty secured crucial wins at the China Open, with Shetty notably upsetting a higher-ranked opponent.
summary: P.V. Sindhu and Ayush Shetty shine at the China Open, advancing past tough competitors in thrilling matches.

title: Lakshya Sen Battles Past Tanaka in China Open Opener
indian_angle: India's top male shuttler Lakshya Sen began his China Open campaign with a challenging victory, moving into the last 16.
summary: The India No. 1 needed 53 minutes to prevail 22-20, 15-21, 21-14 over his Japanese opponent Yushi Tanaka and advance to the last 16.

title: Sindhu's Emotional Japan Open Win Silences Critics
indian_angle: PV Sindhu reflects on her Japan Open triumph, sharing the emotional journey of overcoming doubts and critics to claim the title.
summary: PV Sindhu speaks out about her emotional Japan Open victory, revealing she had tears in her eyes and addressing those who questioned her career.

title: Kohli's Cryptic Remark Ignited Sindhu's Comeback
indian_angle: A look into how a comment from cricket star Virat Kohli played a role in inspiring PV Sindhu's recent resurgence in badminton.
summary: This article explores the unexpected connection between a cryptic remark by Virat Kohli and PV Sindhu's recent return to form on the badminton court.

title: New 3x15 Scoring Format Debuts in Domestic Badminton
indian_angle: India's domestic badminton circuit is set to implement a new 3x15 scoring format, starting with a tournament in Ernakulam.
summary: Badminton's 3x15 scoring will be introduced across all domestic tournaments in India, with its debut scheduled for an event in Ernakulam.
